title: Check If String Is a Prefix of Array
titleCn: 检查字符串是否为数组前缀

testcases.input: s = "iloveleetcode", words = ["i","love","leetcode","apples"] Output: true Explanation: s can be made by concatenating "i", "love", and "leetcode" together.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: s can be made by concatenating "i", "love", and "leetcode" together.

testcases.input: s = "iloveleetcode", words = ["apples","i","love","leetcode"] Output: false Explanation: It is impossible to make s using a prefix of arr.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: It is impossible to make s using a prefix of arr.
